text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh look, it's about time for me to go to training.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, did you see this, City? You're on the
cover!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
"Gold City, the runner captivating crowds as she
bolts across the track, leaving a ray of gold in her
wake."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's talking about your heated race! They
say you've gotten so much faster now!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, that happened. Talk about a cringe
headline, though.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
They're looking at my running now. And if I can
become even faster...
choice_data_list: You'll be featured for an entire issue!
You'll be featured for an entire issue!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh, maybe... Now that you've said it, you've got
to make it happen, yeah?
